# IFR Benefits

> The installable Inferno Protocol customer and seller app for benefits based on locked IFR.

## Canonical URLs

- App: https://shop.ifrunit.tech/
- Customer and seller guide: https://shop.ifrunit.tech/guide
- Compatible seller QR scanner: https://shop.ifrunit.tech/scan
- Protocol website: https://ifrunit.tech/
- User Web3 actions: https://web3.ifrunit.tech/
- Technical documentation: https://ifrunit.tech/wiki/

## Current Capabilities

- Customers connect an external Ethereum wallet, read IFR and IFRLock status, lock IFR, discover public seller offers, present a short-lived checkout pass, scan compatible seller QR codes and load their own signed benefit history.
- Sellers create wallet-owned profiles, publish service areas, products and benefit rules, delegate checkout operators, bind customer passes, issue compatible checkout QR codes, redeem approved sessions once and export masked recent reconciliation data.
- The app is a PWA for phone, tablet and desktop. It does not request seed phrases or private keys.
- Benefit verification reads IFRLock on Ethereum Mainnet. It does not transfer customer tokens.
- IFR Copilot is contextual read-only help. It cannot sign transactions or access wallet secrets.

## Important Limits

- PartnerVault seller rewards remain governance-gated and are not active for general sellers.
- Embedded-wallet work is an isolated Sepolia prototype, not a production shop capability.
- Private checkout, customer-pass, seller-console and API URLs are intentionally excluded from search indexing.

## Token

- Name: Inferno
- On-chain symbol: IFR
- Social cashtag: $IFRp
- Chain: Ethereum Mainnet (chain ID 1)
- Contract: 0x77e99917Eca8539c62F509ED1193ac36580A6e7B
- IFRLock: 0x769928aBDfc949D0718d8766a1C2d7dBb63954Eb
